interaction_phrase: headed by
occurrence_sentence: The institute — headed by American scientist Jacob D. Biamonte — is just one of a number of research groups that are appearing on the scene.

interaction_phrase: in the steamy tropics of southeast Asia
occurrence_sentence: Another one of note doing its thing in the steamy tropics of southeast Asia is the Centre For Quantum Technologies (CQT), Singapore.

interaction_phrase: with the help of Singapore's National Research Foundation
occurrence_sentence: Founded at the back end of 2007 with the help of Singapore's National Research Foundation and Ministry of Education, the CQT's purpose is to _'bring together physicists, computer scientists and engineers to do basic research on quantum physics and to build devices based on quantum phenomena.'_

interaction_phrase: Head of the team
occurrence_sentence: Head of the team of over 150 scientific researchers and support staff is British-Polish professor of quantum physics, [Artur Ekert](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Artur_Ekert), the CQT's founding director.

interaction_phrase: making inroads in the dissemination of information in QC, as well as educating the masses in the process, Singapore
occurrence_sentence: With initiatives like the CQT making inroads in the dissemination of information in QC, as well as educating the masses in the process, Singapore — which is already becoming a hotbed for QC startups — could be one of the countries to watch in the space in the years to come.
